message:
chore: gate subject module behind messaging-fabric feature, audit entries, beads sync

src/messaging/mod.rs: adds `pub mod subject` gated behind the
messaging-fabric feature flag, matching the existing `pub mod class`
and `pub use class::*` pattern for the native FABRIC lane.

audit_index.jsonl: 2 new entries from recent audit work.

.beads/issues.jsonl: synced issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
